options.text: Do you have any smaller rooms open at 10 AM?
What is the price of the conference room?
Can you show me a list of all available rooms?

content.explanation: 正确答案Do you have any smaller rooms open at 10 AM？是最合适的提问，因为它询问了会议室的可用情况。选项2和3询问了不相关的信息，选项4询问了过于详细的信息，都是不正确的
content.scenarioHint: 用户通常在需要信息时先提问

options.text: Is the big conference room free on Thursday at 2 PM?
Can I have the conference room on Thursday at 2 PM?
Do you have any meetings on Thursday at 2 PM?
What is the conference room's schedule for Thursday?

content.explanation: 答案解析：正确答案"Is the big conference room free on Thursday at 2 PM?"是最合适的提问方式，因为它明确询问会议室在特定时段是否可用。其他选项虽然表达了类似的意思，但不是最合适的方式。
content.scenarioHint: 你想知道会议室的可用情况，通常在需要信息时先提问

options.text: I have no idea — ask someone else.
It’s taken until 5 PM. Would 5:30 work for you?
Yes, but it’s messy right now.
We don’t have a training room.

content.explanation: 正确答案主动提供替代时间，符合'提高预订成功率'的使用说明。选项1推卸责任，不符合职场协作；选项3提及清洁状况，与可用性无关；选项4错误陈述设施不存在，与场景矛盾。
content.speakerText: Is the training room available tomorrow at 3 PM?
content.speakerTextCn: 明天下午三点培训室有空吗？
